response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with over 15 years in the industry and a diverse technical background. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure is a significant strength and directly relevant to the role. However, his resume primarily showcases strong hands-on implementation skills and project-level leadership rather than the director-level strategic vision and proven experience in shaping large-scale AI product strategy required for this Principal Engineer position. An interview would be necessary to determine if his strategic capabilities align with the seniority of the role.
strengths: Extensive and diverse software engineering experience (15+ years) across web, mobile, and backend systems.
Recent, relevant experience in building AI-agent infrastructure and tooling.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through founding an open-source project and leading technical workshops.
concerns: Experience is at the Staff/Senior level, potentially lacking the director-level strategic influence required for a Principal role.
Limited demonstrated history of shipping major AI-powered products or platforms from concept to launch.
AI-specific experience appears to be very recent, which may not meet the 'recognized expertise' preference.
